神の子.name: Child of God
神の子.description: While on the mound, teammate batters gain Contact +5 and Power +5.

ケンカ投法.name: Fighting Pitching Style
ケンカ投法.description: When pitching inside, Control improves and ball power increases significantly.

草魂.name: Weed Spirit
草魂.description: Rarely falls into a rattled or shaken state.

世界の代打王.name: World Pinch Hitter King
世界の代打王.description: When entering the batter's box as a pinch hitter, Contact +25 and Power +20.

世界の盗塁王.name: World Stolen Base King
世界の盗塁王.description: Greatly increases running speed when stealing bases. Also, when on first base with runners on first or first-and-third, decreases the opposing pitcher's Control by 10 and increases their stamina consumption.

牛若丸.name: Ushiwakamaru
牛若丸.description: When defending, increases throwing speed and back-pedaling speed, and quickens the initial reaction.

忍者.name: Ninja
忍者.description: When defending, increases throwing speed and back-pedaling speed, and quickens the initial reaction.

世界の王.name: World King
世界の王.description: When using Power Swing, makes it very easy to hit fly balls with home run potential. Cannot be equipped together with Line Drive.

打撃の神様.name: God of Batting
打撃の神様.description: When using Regular Swing, makes it very easy to hit balls with base hit potential.

小阪ゾーン.name: Kosaka Zone
小阪ゾーン.description: When defending, increases throwing speed and back-pedaling speed, and quickens the initial reaction.

炎のストッパー.name: Fiery Stopper
炎のストッパー.description: When not exhausted, with 0 or fewer earned runs, and the game is tied or leading, the ball quality becomes heavier and it becomes harder to fall into a rattled state. Also, negates the Intimidation effect of opposing batters.

大魔神.name: Daimajin
大魔神.description: When coming on the mound as the second or later pitcher, decreases opposing batters' Contact by 20 and Power by 20.

幕張の防波堤.name: Makuhari Breakwater
幕張の防波堤.description: Late in the game while leading, in a situation where a runner scoring would tie or reverse the game, pitch speed +2 km/h and Control +5.

負けないエース.name: Unbeatable Ace
負けないエース.description: While on the mound, teammate batters gain Power +5.

平成の怪物.name: Heisei Monster
平成の怪物.description: The life/movement of the fastball is evaluated on a 7-stage scale from A to G.

雑草魂.name: Weed Soul
雑草魂.description: Resistance to becoming rattled after giving up hits is evaluated on a 7-stage scale from A to G.

燃える男.name: Burning Man
燃える男.description: When not exhausted, with 0 or fewer earned runs, and the game is tied or leading, the ball quality becomes heavier and it becomes harder to fall into a rattled state. Also, negates the Intimidation effect of opposing batters.

小さな大投手.name: Little Great Pitcher
小さな大投手.description: Evaluated on a 4-stage scale from ✕ to ◎; ◯ and ◎ reduce stamina consumption.

アニキ.name: Aniki
アニキ.description: Teammate fielders gain Contact +5 and Power +5.

Mrブルーウェーブ.name: Mr. Blue Wave
Mrブルーウェーブ.description: Teammate fielders gain Contact +5 and Power +5.

Mrドラゴンズ.name: Mr. Dragons
Mrドラゴンズ.description: Teammate fielders gain Contact +5 and Power +5.

Mrパーフェクト.name: Mr. Perfect
Mrパーフェクト.description: Teammate fielders gain Contact +5 and Power +5.

Mr赤ヘル.name: Mr. Akahel
Mr赤ヘル.description: Teammate fielders gain Contact +5 and Power +5.

Mrタイガース.name: Mr. Tigers
Mrタイガース.description: Teammate fielders gain Contact +5 and Power +5.

Mrイーグルs.name: Mr. Eagles
Mrイーグルs.description: Teammate fielders gain Contact +5 and Power +5.

Mrスワローズ.name: Mr. Swallows
Mrスワローズ.description: Teammate fielders gain Contact +5 and Power +5.

Mrホークス.name: Mr. Hawks
Mrホークス.description: Teammate fielders gain Contact +5 and Power +5.

Mrファイターズ.name: Mr. Fighters
Mrファイターズ.description: Teammate fielders gain Contact +5 and Power +5.

Mrブレーブス.name: Mr. Braves
Mrブレーブス.description: Teammate fielders gain Contact +5 and Power +5.

ミスター.name: Mister
ミスター.description: Decreases opposing pitcher's speed by 2 km/h, Control by 10, and increases stamina consumption by 15. For the batter right before you, decreases opposing pitcher's speed by 2 km/h, Control by 10, and increases stamina consumption by 10.

絶好調男.name: In-Form Man
絶好調男.description: Teammate fielders gain Contact +5 and Power +5.

若大將.name: Young General
若大將.description: Teammate fielders gain Contact +5 and Power +5.

バックスクリーン男.name: Batter's Eye Man
バックスクリーン男.description: When using Power Swing, makes it easy to hit fly balls with home run potential.

小さな大打者.name: Little Great Batter
小さな大打者.description: When using Regular Swing, makes it easy to hit balls with base hit potential.

アライバ.name: Araiba Combo
アライバ.description: When defending, increases throwing speed and back-pedaling speed.

おかわり君.name: Mr. Seconds
おかわり君.description: If a home run has already been hit in the game, Power +10 (ineffective for the 2nd home run and onwards).

不惑の大砲.name: Unwavering Cannon
不惑の大砲.description: When using Power Swing, makes it easy to hit fly balls with home run potential.

悲劇のエース.name: Tragic Ace
悲劇のエース.description: While on the mound, teammate batters suffer Power -5.

抜け球.name: Slipping Pitch
抜け球.description: Fastballs sometimes naturally drift or cut in the direction of a shootball.

サンデー◯.name: Sunday ◯
サンデー◯.description: Abilities increase during games played on Sundays.

外国人◯.name: Foreign Player ◯
外国人◯.description: Abilities increase when facing foreign players.

ドーム◯.name: Dome ◯
ドーム◯.description: Abilities increase when playing in dome stadiums.

フライボールピッチャー.name: Fly Ball Pitcher
フライボールピッチャー.description: Dual-edged trait. Slightly increases the trajectory of opposing batters' hits.

トップギア.name: Top Gear
トップギア.description: In the 1st and 2nd innings when starting, pitch speed +4 km/h, Control +13, and break amount +2.

闘魂.name: Fighting Spirit
闘魂.description: When not exhausted, trailing or leading by 2 runs or less, and with 2 or fewer earned runs, the ball quality becomes heavier, making it harder to become rattled and negating the batter's Intimidation.

超投打躍動.name: Super Two-Way Dynamism
超投打躍動.description: When playing as a pitcher and allowing 2 or fewer runs, Contact and Power significantly increase; if you get 1 or more hits, Control and break amount significantly increase.

完全燃焼.name: Complete Combustion
完全燃焼.description: When runners are in scoring position and stamina is above roughly 1/3, the ball quality becomes heavier and fastball life improves, but stamina consumption increases.

ディレイドアーム.name: Delayed Arm
ディレイドアーム.description: Hides the ball longer during the delivery, making it harder for the batter to see the arm slot and hit the ball.

クロスキャノン.name: Cross Cannon
クロスキャノン.description: Pitches thrown across the diamond/diagonal zone look faster than their actual speed.

暴れ球.name: Wild Pitch
暴れ球.description: When throwing fastballs, the life improves significantly, but the location becomes prone to drifting.

怪童.name: Prodigy
怪童.description: Fastballs look significantly faster than their actual speed.

怪物球威.name: Monster Ball Power
怪物球威.description: Ball quality becomes extremely heavy, making hits very difficult to travel far.

ガソリンタンク.name: Gas Tank
ガソリンタンク.description: Stamina recovery speed after a game appearance is extremely fast.

ギアチェンジ.name: Gear Change
ギアチェンジ.description: From the 5th inning onwards when starting, leading by 3 runs or less or tied with runners on base, pitch speed +1 km/h, Control +10, and breaking balls start to break closer to the batter.

強心臓.name: Strong Heart
強心臓.description: When runners are in scoring position, pitch speed +2 km/h and break amount +3.

驚異の切れ味.name: Astonishing Sharpness
驚異の切れ味.description: The initial break point of breaking balls is delayed significantly, creating a sudden, sharp break right in front of the batter.

終盤力.name: Late-Game Strength
終盤力.description: When starting, in a winning position or trailing within 3 runs, pitch speed +4 km/h, Control +10, and break amount +2.

勝利の星.name: Star of Victory
勝利の星.description: While on the mound, teammate batters gain Contact +5 and Power +5.

主砲キラー.name: Cleanup Killer
主砲キラー.description: When facing batters with Contact B or higher or Power A or higher, pitch speed +3 km/h, breaking ball speed +1 km/h, and breaking balls start to break closer to the batter.

精密機械.name: Precision Machinery
精密機械.description: Control capability at the bottom of the strike zone becomes exceptionally excellent.

走者釘付.name: Pinning the Runner
走者釘付.description: The pitching delivery motion becomes significantly faster.

鉄腕.name: Iron Arm
鉄腕.description: Hardly affected by daily condition/form fluctuations (arrows).

ドクターK.name: Doctor K
ドクターK.description: When the batter is cornered with 2 strikes, pitch speed +4 km/h and break amount +2.

ド根性.name: True Grit
ド根性.description: When starting, even if exhausted, the drop in attributes slows down and stops sooner.

内角無双.name: Inside Unrivaled
内角無双.description: When pitching inside, Control improves and ball power increases significantly.

ハイスピンジャイロ.name: High-Spin Gyro
ハイスピンジャイロ.description: Fastballs generate a spiral gyro-spin, appearing significantly faster than their actual speed.

左キラー.name: Left-Handed Batter Killer
左キラー.description: When facing left-handed batters, pitch speed +3 km/h, Control +7, and stamina consumption increases.

不屈の魂.name: Indomitable Soul
不屈の魂.description: Rarely falls into a rattled or shaken state.

変幻自在.name: Ever-Changing
変幻自在.description: When throwing a slow breaking ball after a fastball, or vice versa, the fastball looks much faster than actual speed, and the initial break point of the breaking ball is significantly delayed.

本塁打厳禁.name: Home Runs Strictly Prohibited
本塁打厳禁.description: Significantly decreases the chance of a missed pitch hanging right over the heart of the plate.

球界の頭脳.name: Brain of the Baseball World
球界の頭脳.description: Teammate pitcher's Control +15, stamina consumption -11. If teammate pitcher's condition is bad or terrible, pitch speed +2 km/h.

ささやき戦術.name: Whispering Tactics
ささやき戦術.description: As a catcher when runners are in scoring position, decreases opposing batters' Contact by 5 and Power by 5.

鉄の壁.name: Iron Wall
鉄の壁.description: As a catcher, significantly reduces the activation rate of runners' Home Charge and Heavy Tank during home plate collisions.

バズーカ送球.name: Bazooka Throw
バズーカ送球.description: Throws made to prevent stolen bases become exceptionally sharp and fast.

渾身の決勝打.name: All-Out Game-Winning Hit
渾身の決勝打.description: From the 6th inning onwards when tied or trailing, in a situation where a base runner scoring would take the lead, Contact +12.

ヒートアップ.name: Heat Up
ヒートアップ.description: Contact +8 and Power +8 depending on the number of strikes in the count.

逆襲.name: Counterattack
逆襲.description: When facing the pitcher who got you out in the previous plate appearance, Contact +10 and Power +5.

安打製造機.name: Hit Manufacturing Machine
安打製造機.description: When using Regular Swing, makes it very easy to hit balls with base hit potential.

アーチスト.name: Artist
アーチスト.description: When using Power Swing, makes it very easy to hit fly balls with home run potential. Cannot be equipped together with Line Drive.

一球入魂.name: Soul in Every Pitch
一球入魂.description: Before a single strike is recorded, Contact +15 and Power +15.

エースキラー.name: Ace Killer
エースキラー.description: When facing ace-tier pitchers, Contact +15 and Power +15.

大番狂わせ.name: Major Upset
大番狂わせ.description: When starting and tied from the 5th inning onwards, or trailing/tied late in the game, Power becomes S if runners are on base (no change if already S).

火事場の馬鹿力.name: Incredible Crisis Strength
火事場の馬鹿力.description: Late in the game while trailing, Contact +20 and Power +20.

外角必打.name: Outside Edge Strike
外角必打.description: Becomes exceptionally adept at hitting outside pitches. Cannot be equipped together with Outside Hitter or Inside Edge Strike.

気迫ヘッド.name: Spirited Head-First Slide
気迫ヘッド.description: Slides head-first into bases during crucial, tight moments.

恐怖の満塁男.name: Terror of Bases Loaded
恐怖の満塁男.description: When bases are loaded, Contact +20 and Power +20.

切り込み隊長.name: Spearhead Leader
切り込み隊長.description: When there are no runners on base, Contact +15 and Power +10.

芸術的流し打ち.name: Artistic Opposite-Field Hit
芸術的流し打ち.description: When hitting to the opposite field with a Regular Swing, the ball easily drops for a hit.

広角砲.name: Wide-Angle Cannon
広角砲.description: Enables hitting exceptionally powerful balls to the opposite field. Cannot be equipped together with Pull Hitter or Pull Master.

高速レーザー.name: High-Speed Laser
高速レーザー.description: When defending in the outfield, delivers extremely fast throws along a low trajectory.

高速ベースラン.name: High-Speed Base Running
高速ベースラン.description: Significantly increases running speed during base running (excluding stealing), and prevents head-first sliding when reaching third base.

高球必打.name: High Pitch Strike
高球必打.description: Becomes exceptionally adept at hitting high pitches. Cannot be equipped together with Low Ball Hitter or Low Pitch Strike.

左腕キラー.name: Left-Handed Pitcher Killer
左腕キラー.description: When facing left-handed pitchers, Contact +20 and Power +15.

勝負師.name: Clutch Master
勝負師.description: When runners are in scoring position, Contact +20 and Power +15.

重戦車.name: Heavy Tank
重戦車.description: Attempts to induce a catching error by sliding powerfully into home plate.

ストライク送球.name: Strike Throw
ストライク送球.description: Throws become exceptionally accurate and resistant to drifting offline.

精神的支柱.name: Spiritual Pillar
精神的支柱.description: Teammate pitcher's Control +10, teammate batter's Contact +10 and Power +5.

代打の神様.name: God of Pinch Hitting
代打の神様.description: When entering the batter's box as a pinch hitter, Contact +25 and Power +20.

電光石火.name: Lightning Speed
電光石火.description: Greatly increases running speed when stealing bases. Also, when on first base with runners on first or first-and-third, decreases the opposing pitcher's Control by 10 and increases their stamina consumption.

鉄人.name: Iron Man
鉄人.description: Becomes extremely resistant to sustaining injuries.

伝説のサヨナラ男.name: Legendary Walk-Off Man
伝説のサヨナラ男.description: In situations where a walk-off victory can be achieved, Contact +20 and Power +20.

低球必打.name: Low Pitch Strike
低球必打.description: Becomes exceptionally adept at hitting low pitches. Cannot be equipped together with High Ball Hitter or High Pitch Strike.

トリックスター.name: Trickster
トリックスター.description: When on base, increases the opposing pitcher's stamina consumption and decreases infield defense (effect increases as more runners with this skill are on base, which also drops the pitcher's Control and break amount).

内角必打.name: Inside Edge Strike
内角必打.description: Becomes exceptionally adept at hitting inside pitches. Cannot be equipped together with Outside Hitter or Outside Edge Strike.

引っ張り屋.name: Pull Master
引っ張り屋.description: When pulling the ball with a Power Swing, hits an exceptionally powerful ball. Cannot be equipped together with Wide-Angle Hitting or Wide-Angle Cannon.

魔術師.name: Magician
魔術師.description: When defending, increases throwing speed and back-pedaling speed, and quickens the initial reaction.

メッタ打ち.name: Hard Hitter
メッタ打ち.description: After hitting 2 hits or more, Contact +20 and Power +5 from the 3rd plate appearance onwards.

ロケットスタート.name: Rocket Start
ロケットスタート.description: The initial acceleration dash after hitting the ball becomes exceptionally fast.

投打躍動.name: Two-Way Dynamism
投打躍動.description: When playing as a pitcher and allowing 2 or fewer runs, Contact and Power increase; if you get 1 or more hits, Control and break amount increase.

立ち上がり◯.name: Good Start ◯
立ち上がり◯.description: When starting, 1st inning pitch speed +4 km/h, Control +13, break amount +2; 2nd inning pitch speed +2 km/h, Control +7, break amount +1.

威圧感（投手）.name: Intimidation (Pitcher)
威圧感（投手）.description: When coming on the mound as the second or later pitcher, decreases opposing batters' Contact by 20 and Power by 20.

重い球.name: Heavy Ball
重い球.description: Even if hit, makes it harder for the ball to travel far.

勝ち運.name: Good Luck
勝ち運.description: While on the mound, teammate batters gain Power +5.

回またぎ◯.name: Multiple Innings ◯
回またぎ◯.description: Reduces fatigue when pitching across multiple innings during relief appearances.

緩急◯.name: Pace Control ◯
緩急◯.description: Improves effectiveness when mixing fastballs and slow breaking balls.

キレ◯.name: Sharpness ◯
キレ◯.description: Improves the sharpness and bite of breaking balls.

緊急登板◯.name: Emergency Appearance ◯
緊急登板◯.description: When entering the game mid-inning, Control +10.

クロスファイヤー.name: Crossfire
クロスファイヤー.description: Fastballs thrown across the diagonal look faster than their actual speed.

牽制◯.name: Pickoff ◯
牽制◯.description: Slightly speeds up the pickoff throw motion and makes wild throwing errors less likely.

根性◯.name: Grit ◯
根性◯.description: When starting, even if exhausted, slows down and caps the drop in attributes to a certain level.

ジャイロボール.name: Gyroball
ジャイロボール.description: Fastballs generate a spiral rotation, appearing faster than actual speed.

尻上がり.name: Strong Finish
尻上がり.description: When starting, 7th/8th inning pitch speed +2 km/h, break amount +1, Control +5; 9th inning onwards pitch speed +4 km/h, break amount +2, Control +10.

対強打者◯.name: Facing Star Batters ◯
対強打者◯.description: When facing dangerous batters with Contact B or Power A, pitch speed +2 km/h and break amount +1.

球持ち◯.name: Good Extension ◯
球持ち◯.description: Hides the ball better during release, delaying the display of the ball's landing point indicator.

対ランナー◯.name: Facing Runners ◯
対ランナー◯.description: With runners on first or first-and-third, Control +5 and stamina consumption decreases.

打球反応◯.name: Comebacker Reaction ◯
打球反応◯.description: Improves responsiveness to batted balls hit directly back at the pitcher.

奪三振.name: Strikeout Master
奪三振.description: When the batter is cornered with 2 strikes, pitch speed +2 km/h and break amount +1.

闘志.name: Guts
闘志.description: When not exhausted, with 0 or fewer earned runs, and the game is tied or leading, the ball quality becomes heavier and it becomes harder to fall into a rattled state. Also, negates the Intimidation effect of opposing batters.

ナチュラルシュート.name: Natural Shoot
ナチュラルシュート.description: Fastballs often naturally tail slightly in the direction of a shootball.

内角攻め.name: Inside Attack
内角攻め.description: Improves Control when pitching to the inside corner.

逃げ球.name: Escape Ball
逃げ球.description: Reduces the tendency of missed pitches to float into the center of the zone.

低め◯.name: Low Zone ◯
低め◯.description: Improves Control accuracy at the bottom of the strike zone.

真っスラ.name: Massura
真っスラ.description: Pronounced 'Massura'. A fastball type that naturally cuts slightly in the opposite direction of the pitcher's throwing arm.

要所◯.name: Key Inning ◯
要所◯.description: Late in the game while leading, in a situation where a runner scoring would tie or reverse the game, pitch speed +2 km/h and Control +5.

リリース◯.name: Consistent Release ◯
リリース◯.description: Ensures that the pitching motion remains identical between fastballs and breaking balls.

窮地◯.name: Cornered ◯
窮地◯.description: Contact +4 and Power +4 depending on the number of strikes in the count.

リベンジ.name: Revenge
リベンジ.description: When facing the pitcher who got you out in the previous plate appearance, Contact +10.

マルチ弾.name: Multi-HR
マルチ弾.description: If a home run has already been hit in the game, Power +10 (ineffective for the 2nd home run and onwards).

アベレージヒッター.name: Average Hitter
アベレージヒッター.description: When using Regular Swing, makes it easy to hit balls with base hit potential.

アウトコースヒッター.name: Outside Hitter
アウトコースヒッター.description: Adept at hitting outside pitches. Cannot be equipped together with Inside Hitter or Inside Edge Strike.

威圧感（野手）.name: Intimidation (Fielder)
威圧感（野手）.description: Decreases opposing pitcher's speed by 2 km/h, Control by 10, and increases stamina consumption by 15. For the batter right before you, decreases opposing pitcher's speed by 2 km/h, Control by 10, and increases stamina consumption by 10.

インコースヒッター.name: Inside Hitter
インコースヒッター.description: Adept at hitting inside pitches. Cannot be equipped together with Outside Hitter or Outside Edge Strike.

意外性.name: Unpredictability
意外性.description: When starting and tied from the 5th inning onwards, or trailing/tied late in the game, Power becomes A if runners are on base (no change if already A or higher).

いぶし銀.name: Veteran Craftsmanship
いぶし銀.description: Late in the game when trailing by 1 run or tied with runners in scoring position, a Regular Swing easily results in a hit.

固め打ち.name: Streaky Hitter
固め打ち.description: After hitting 2 hits or more, Contact +10 and Power +5 from the 3rd plate appearance onwards.

カット打ち.name: Foul Off Hitter
カット打ち.description: With 2 strikes, a Regular Swing easily ticks or fouls off the ball even if the timing is slightly late.

かく乱.name: Distraction
かく乱.description: When on base, increases the opposing pitcher's stamina consumption and decreases infield defense (effect increases as more runners with this skill are on base, which also drops the pitcher's Control and break amount).

逆境◯.name: Adversity ◯
逆境◯.description: Late in the game while trailing, Contact +15 and Power +15.

決勝打.name: Go-Ahead Hit
決勝打.description: From the 6th inning onwards when tied or trailing, in a situation where a base runner scoring would take the lead, Contact +5.

高速チャージ.name: High-Speed Charge
高速チャージ.description: Enables faster tracking and fielding against opponent bunts.

広角打法.name: Wide-Angle Hitting
広角打法.description: Enables hitting powerful balls to the opposite field. Cannot be equipped together with Pull Hitter or Pull Master.

サヨナラ男.name: Walk-Off Man
サヨナラ男.description: Power +15 in a situation where a home run results in a walk-off victory; Contact +15 in a situation where scoring a runner from scoring position results in a walk-off victory.

守備職人.name: Fielding Craftsman
守備職人.description: When defending, increases throwing speed and back-pedaling speed.

初球◯.name: First Pitch ◯
初球◯.description: Before a single strike is recorded, Contact +10 and Power +5.

対エース◯.name: Facing Aces ◯
対エース◯.description: When facing ace-tier pitchers, Contact +10 and Power +10.

代打◯.name: Pinch Hitter ◯
代打◯.description: When entering the batter's box as a pinch hitter, Contact +15 and Power +15.

ダメ押し.name: Insurance Run
ダメ押し.description: When leading by 4 runs or more, increases Power by 10 late in the game.

対変化球◯.name: Facing Breaking Balls ◯
対変化球◯.description: Becomes adept at hitting breaking balls.

チャンスメーカー.name: Chance Maker
チャンスメーカー.description: When there are no runners on base, Contact +10 and Power +5.

内野安打◯.name: Infield Hit ◯
内野安打◯.description: Speeds up the initial acceleration dash after hitting the ball.

流し打ち.name: Opposite-Field Hit
流し打ち.description: When hitting to the opposite field with a Regular Swing, the ball easily drops for a hit.

粘り打ち.name: Battling Style
粘り打ち.description: When cornered with 2 strikes, Regular Swing Contact +10.

パワーヒッター.name: Power Hitter
パワーヒッター.description: When using Power Swing, makes it easy to hit fly balls with home run potential.

ハイボールヒッター.name: High Ball Hitter
ハイボールヒッター.description: Becomes adept at hitting high pitches. Cannot be equipped together with Low Ball Hitter or Low Pitch Strike.

バント◯.name: Bunt ◯
バント◯.description: Bunted balls easily soften and drop cleanly onto the infield ground.

バント職人.name: Bunt Craftsman
バント職人.description: Bunted balls become exceptionally easy to safely deaden on the ground.

プレッシャーラン.name: Pressure Run
プレッシャーラン.description: During potential double-play timings, sliding from first into second base can sometimes cause the opponent fielder's throw to first base to go wild.

プルヒッター.name: Pull Hitter
プルヒッター.description: When pulling the ball with a Power Swing, hits a powerful ball. Cannot be equipped together with Wide-Angle Hitting or Wide-Angle Cannon.

ヘッドスライディング.name: Head-First Slide
ヘッドスライディング.description: Slides head-first into bases during crucial, tight moments.

ホーム突入.name: Home Charge
ホーム突入.description: As a runner during home plate collisions, sometimes causes the opponent catcher to drop the ball.

ホーム死守.name: Defend Home
ホーム死守.description: As a catcher, reduces the activation rate of runners' Home Charge and Heavy Tank.

満塁男.name: Bases Loaded Man
満塁男.description: When bases are loaded, Contact +15 and Power +15.

ムード◯.name: Good Mood ◯
ムード◯.description: Teammate fielders gain Contact +5 and Power +5.

ラインドライブ.name: Line Drive
ラインドライブ.description: When using Power Swing, makes it easy to hit sharp line drives (excluding grounders). Cannot be equipped together with Power Hitter or Artist.

レーザービーム.name: Laser Beam
レーザービーム.description: When defending in the outfield, delivers throws along a low, fast trajectory.

ローボールヒッター.name: Low Ball Hitter
ローボールヒッター.description: Becomes adept at hitting low pitches. Cannot be equipped together with High Ball Hitter or High Pitch Strike.

対ランナー×.name: Facing Runners ×
対ランナー×.description: When runners are on first or first-and-third, the pitcher's capabilities decline.

一発.name: Gopherball
一発.description: Increases the chance of a missed pitch hanging right down the middle of the plate.

ガラスのハート.name: Glass Heart
ガラスのハート.description: Once a hit is conceded, becomes extremely easy to fall into a rattled state.

軽い球.name: Light Ball
軽い球.description: Once hit, makes it very easy for the ball to travel deep or far.

シュート回転.name: Shoot Spin
シュート回転.description: Fastballs sometimes naturally drift or cut in the direction of a shootball.

四球.name: Walk Prone
四球.description: When the count reaches 3 balls, Control suffers -20.

スロースターター.name: Slow Starter
スロースターター.description: When starting, 1st inning pitch speed -4 km/h, Control -13, break amount -2; 2nd inning pitch speed -2 km/h, Control -7, break amount -1.

寸前.name: Choke Prone
寸前.description: In the final inning or in the 5th inning when starting while leading, pitch speed -2 km/h and Control -10.

短気.name: Short Temper
短気.description: When falling into a rattled state, Control drops by 10.

ノミの心臓.name: Flea Heart
ノミの心臓.description: When runners are in scoring position, break amount drops by 3.

負け運.name: Bad Luck
負け運.description: While on the mound, teammate batters suffer Power -5.

乱調.name: Control Collapse
乱調.description: When starting, there is a random chance from the 3rd inning onwards at the beginning of a half-inning to suffer Control -20.

エラー.name: Error Prone
エラー.description: When runners are in scoring position, fielding errors become easy to commit.

三振.name: Strikeout Prone
三振.description: When cornered with 2 strikes, Contact drops by 20 (excluding full counts).

扇風機.name: Whirlwind Whiffer
扇風機.description: When cornered with 2 strikes, Contact drops by 30 (excluding full counts).

併殺.name: Grounded into Double Play
併殺.description: With 0 or 1 out and a runner on first, becomes prone to hitting ground balls.

ムード✕.name: Bad Mood ✕
ムード✕.description: Teammate fielders suffer Contact -5 and Power -5.

全開.name: Full Open
全開.description: Dual-edged trait. When runners are in scoring position and stamina is above roughly half, ball quality becomes heavier and fastball life improves, but stamina consumption increases.

悪球打ち.name: Bad Ball Hitter
悪球打ち.description: Dual-edged trait. Becomes prone to swinging at pitches that clearly deviate outside the strike zone.

荒れ球.name: Wild Zone Ball
荒れ球.description: Dual-edged trait. Fastball location drifts wider than usual, but a small amount of extra fastball life is added.

ゴロピッチャー.name: Ground Ball Pitcher
ゴロピッチャー.description: Dual-edged trait. Slightly decreases the trajectory of opposing batters' hits.

力配分.name: Effort Allocation
力配分.description: Dual-edged trait. Against batters with Power E or lower, or with runners in scoring position against batters with Power F or lower, pitch speed -2 km/h, break amount -1, and stamina consumption increases.

ポーカーフェイス.name: Poker Face
ポーカーフェイス.description: Dual-edged trait. Fatigue or rattling will not be displayed on the character's facial expressions. Cannot be equipped together with Guts.

打たれ強さ.name: Hit Resistance
打たれ強さ.description: Resistance to becoming rattled after giving up hits is evaluated on a 7-stage scale from A to G.

回復.name: Recovery
回復.description: How easily fatigue is recovered is evaluated on a 7-stage scale from A to G.

クイック.name: Quick Delivery
クイック.description: Proficiency in quick pitching to suppress base stealing is evaluated on a 7-stage scale from A to G.

対ピンチ.name: Clutch Pitching
対ピンチ.description: Strength when runners are in scoring position is evaluated on a 7-stage scale from A to G.

対左打者.name: Facing Lefties (Pitcher)
対左打者.description: Strength when up against left-handed batters is evaluated on a 7-stage scale from A to G.

ノビ.name: Fastball Life
ノビ.description: The life/movement quality of the fastball is evaluated on a 7-stage scale from A to G.

キャッチャー.name: Catcher Lead
キャッチャー.description: Ability to guide and unlock the potential of the pitcher is evaluated on a 4-stage scale from ✕ to ◎.

ケガしにくさ.name: Injury Resistance
ケガしにくさ.description: Evaluated on a 4-stage scale from ✕ to ◎; ◯ and ◎ reduce stamina consumption.

走塁.name: Base Running Tech
走塁.description: Base running technique and intelligence are evaluated on a 4-stage scale from ✕ to ◎.

送球.name: Throwing Tech
送球.description: Accuracy and resistance to throwing errors are evaluated on a 4-stage scale from ✕ to ◎.

対左投手.name: Facing Lefties (Batter)
対左投手.description: Strength when up against left-handed pitchers is evaluated on a 4-stage scale from ✕ to ◎.

チャンス.name: Clutch Batting
チャンス.description: Batting performance under pressure when runners are in scoring position is evaluated on a 4-stage scale from ✕ to ◎.

盗塁.name: Stealing Tech
盗塁.description: Stealing execution proficiency is evaluated on a 4-stage scale from ✕ to ◎.

火の玉ストレート.name: Fireball Fastball
火の玉ストレート.description: The movement and life of the fastball become exceptionally elite.

怪物.name: Monster
怪物.description: The movement and life of the fastball become exceptionally elite.

世界の代打男.name: World Pinch Hitter Man
世界の代打男.description: Batting performance increases dramatically when stepping up as a pinch hitter.

レッドスター.name: Red Star
レッドスター.description: Stealing execution becomes exceptionally masterful and exerts a rattling pressure on the pitcher.

ゴジラ.name: Godzilla
ゴジラ.description: Exudes an aura of intimidation during both the preceding batter's and your own plate appearances, putting heavy pressure on the pitcher.

SHO-TIME.name: Sho-Time
SHO-TIME.description: Pitching performance positively affects base running, and batting performance positively affects fastball life.

ID野球の申し子.name: Child of ID Baseball
ID野球の申し子.description: A legendary catcher representing the absolute pinnacle of baseball intelligence.

Big Fly.name: Big Fly
Big Fly.description: Adds an angle correction to power swings, making it easier to generate high-arcing fly balls with home run potential.

秋男.name: Autumn Man
秋男.description: During games played from September to November, Contact +10 and Power +5.

夏男.name: Summer Man
夏男.description: During games played from July to August, Contact +10 and Power +5.

春男.name: Spring Man
春男.description: During games played from March to May, Contact +10 and Power +5.

お祭り男.name: Festival Man
お祭り男.description: During special or featured games, Contact +10 and Power +5.

△△キラー.name: △△ Killer
△△キラー.description: When playing against specific teams, decreases opposing batters' hit power if you are a pitcher, or increases your own hit power if you are a hitter.

国際大会◯.name: International Tournament ◯
国際大会◯.description: Abilities increase when playing on the international tournament stage.

必殺仕事人.name: Professional Hitman
必殺仕事人.description: Exceptional clutch execution power when runners are in scoring position.

楽天キラー.name: Rakuten Killer
楽天キラー.description: Highly effective against the Tohoku Rakuten Golden Eagles.

阪神キラー.name: Hanshin Killer
阪神キラー.description: Highly effective against the Hanshin Tigers.

西武キラー.name: Seibu Killer
西武キラー.description: Highly effective against the Saitama Seibu Lions.

広島キラー.name: Hiroshima Killer
広島キラー.description: Highly effective against the Hiroshima Toyo Carp.

巨人キラー.name: Kyojin Killer
巨人キラー.description: Highly effective against the Yomiuri Giants.

中日キラー.name: Chunichi Killer
中日キラー.description: Highly effective against the Chunichi Dragons.

オリックスキラー.name: Orix Killer
オリックスキラー.description: Highly effective against the Orix Buffaloes.

DeNAキラー.name: DeNA Killer
DeNAキラー.description: Highly effective against the Yokohama DeNA BayStars.

ヤクルトキラー.name: Yakult Killer
ヤクルトキラー.description: Highly effective against the Tokyo Yakult Swallows.

ロッテキラー.name: Lotte Killer
ロッテキラー.description: Highly effective against the Chiba Lotte Marines.

ホークスキラー.name: Hawks Killer
ホークスキラー.description: Highly effective against the Fukuoka SoftBank Hawks.

ファイターズキラー.name: Fighters Killer
ファイターズキラー.description: Highly effective against the Hokkaido Nippon-Ham Fighters.

帳尻合わせ.name: Garbage Time Hitter
帳尻合わせ.description: When you have no hits yet and the team holds a major lead, Contact increases from the 3rd plate appearance onwards.

対応変化球◯.name: Breaking Ball Adaptation ◯
対応変化球◯.description: Becomes adept at tracking and hitting breaking balls.

存在感（野手）.name: Presence (Fielder)
存在感（野手）.description: Exudes a heavy presence during both the preceding batter's and your own plate appearances, impacting the opposing pitcher's Control and stamina consumption.

存在感（投手）.name: Presence (Pitcher)
存在感（投手）.description: Exudes presence on the mound during relief appearances, affecting the Contact and Power of opposing batters.

三本柱.name: Three Pillars
三本柱.description: Stepping onto the mound immediately rallies the team toward victory.

ブロッキング.name: Blocking
ブロッキング.description: Resists allowing pitches in the dirt or wild pitches to leak behind the catcher.

フレーミング◎.name: Framing ◎
フレーミング◎.description: Aids the pitcher via masterful framing, significantly boosting the pitcher's effective Control.

フレーミング◯.name: Framing ◯
フレーミング◯.description: Aids the pitcher via skillful framing, boosting the pitcher's effective Control.

ストライク先行.name: Pounding the Zone
ストライク先行.description: Pitches thrown exhibit a strong natural tendency to find the strike zone.

シュート打ちの名人.name: Shootball Hitting Master
シュート打ちの名人.description: Becomes exceptionally skilled at turning on and hitting inside breaks.

ささやき破り.name: Whisper Breaker
ささやき破り.description: Immunizes the batter against the negative effects of the opposing catcher's Whispering Tactics.

Mrフライヤーズ.name: Mr. Flyers
Mrフライヤーズ.description: Lifts and dramatically improves the collective morale and atmosphere of the dugout.

Mrオリオンズ.name: Mr. Orions
Mrオリオンズ.description: Lifts and dramatically improves the collective morale and atmosphere of the dugout.

100万ドルの内野陣.name: Million Dollar Infield
100万ドルの内野陣.description: Exhibits masterful, flawless coordination and veterancy during defensive infield plays.

死球集中.name: HBP Prone
死球集中.description: Dual-edged trait. Missed pitches by the pitcher are highly likely to turn into hit-by-pitch incidents.

国際大会✕.name: International Tournament ✕
国際大会✕.description: Abilities decline when playing on the international tournament stage.

対ランナー✕.name: Facing Runners ✕
対ランナー✕.description: When runners are on first or first-and-third, the pitcher's capabilities decline.

対ランナー.name: Base Runner Discomfort
対ランナー.description: Capabilities decline whenever any runners occupy first or first-and-third base.

ボール先行.name: Falling Behind in Count
ボール先行.description: Pitches exhibit a natural tendency to wander or miss into the ball zone.

調子安定.name: Consistent Form
調子安定.description: Performance remains highly stable and resistant to daily condition fluctuations.

調子極端.name: Volatile Form
調子極端.description: Performance becomes extremely sensitive to daily condition fluctuations.

速球中心.name: Fastball Centric
速球中心.description: Pitch selection leans heavily toward fastballs. Cannot be equipped together with Breaking Ball Centric.

変化球中心.name: Breaking Ball Centric
変化球中心.description: Pitch selection leans heavily toward breaking balls. Cannot be equipped together with Fastball Centric.

投球位置左.name: Rubber Position Left
投球位置左.description: The pitcher stands at the left edge (third-base side) of the rubber from the batter's point of view. Cannot be equipped with Rubber Position Right.

投球位置右.name: Rubber Position Right
投球位置右.description: The pitcher stands at the right edge (first-base side) of the rubber from the batter's point of view. Cannot be equipped with Rubber Position Left.

テンポ◯.name: Fast Tempo ◯
テンポ◯.description: When controlled by the COM, the time interval between consecutive pitches is short.

野手調子安定.name: Consistent Fielder Form
野手調子安定.description: Batting performance remains highly stable and resistant to condition changes. Cannot be equipped with Volatile Fielder Form.

野手調子極端.name: Volatile Fielder Form
野手調子極端.description: Batting performance becomes extremely sensitive to condition changes. Cannot be equipped with Consistent Fielder Form.

人気者.name: Fan Favorite
人気者.description: The crowd cheer volume increases dramatically when entering the batter's box.

強振多用.name: Frequent Power Swing
強振多用.description: Leans heavily toward utilizing Power Swings; cannot be equipped together with Frequent Regular Swing.

ミート多用.name: Frequent Regular Swing
ミート多用.description: Leans heavily toward utilizing Regular Swings (Contact hitting).

積極打法.name: Aggressive Hitting Style
積極打法.description: Swings aggressively at pitches. Cannot be equipped together with Patient Hitting Style.

慎重打法.name: Patient Hitting Style
慎重打法.description: Takes pitches patiently. Cannot be equipped together with Aggressive Hitting Style.

積極走塁.name: Aggressive Base Running
積極走塁.description: Forces the envelope with aggressive base running choices.

積極守備.name: Aggressive Defense
積極守備.description: Attacks batted balls with aggressive defensive routing.

チームプレイ◯.name: Team Player ◯
チームプレイ◯.description: When controlled by the COM, actively looks to execute sacrifice bunts.

チームプレイ✕.name: Individualistic Fielder ✕
チームプレイ✕.description: When controlled by the COM, rarely or reluctantly executes sacrifice bunts.

選球眼.name: Good Eye
選球眼.description: Improves overall vision and judgment to distinguish strikes from balls.

積極盗塁.name: Aggressive Stealing
積極盗塁.description: The probability of attempting a steal increases. Cannot be used together with Cautious Stealing.

慎重盗塁.name: Cautious Stealing
慎重盗塁.description: The probability of attempting a steal decreases. Cannot be used together with Aggressive Stealing.

スーパーカートリオ.name: Supercar Trio
スーパーカートリオ.description: The probability of attempting a steal increases. Cannot be used together with Cautious Stealing.

ブンブン丸.name: Free Swinger
ブンブン丸.description: Leans heavily toward utilizing Power Swings; cannot be equipped together with Frequent Regular Swing.
